title: Lovely Crumbly British Sausage Fried Sausage Roll
description: A cozy British dish featuring crumbly sausage, capers, and a hint of mustard. Serve warm and enjoy with a cup of tea!

ingredients.name: Sausage meat (500g)
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought or homemade sausage meat mixture

ingredients.name: Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Panko or regular breadcrumbs work well

ingredients.name: Cheddar cheese (115g)
ingredients.notes: Shredded or grated cheese is best

ingredients.name: Capers (15g)
ingredients.notes: Chopped or sliced capers are fine

ingredients.name: Mustard (10g)
ingredients.notes: Dijon or whole-grain mustard is good

ingredients.name: Egg (1)
ingredients.notes: Use one whole egg for the sausage mixture

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sausage meat, breadcrumbs, cheddar cheese, capers, and mustard. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Crack in the egg and mix until the mixture is sticky but not too wet. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal pieces and shape each into a ball. Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Place a piece of baking paper on a flat surface and lay a disk-shaped sausage mixture in the center. Drizzle with a little water and fold the baking paper over to create a papillote.
Wrap the papillote in aluminum foil and place on a baking sheet. Repeat with the remaining sausage mixture.
Bake the papillotes in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the papillotes from the oven and carefully unwrap them. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add a small amount of olive oil.
Fry the sausage rolls in the pan for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
Serve the Lovely Crumbly British Sausage Fried Sausage Roll warm and enjoy!
